# spirl_trust_domain_config (Resource)

Manages trust domain-level configuration sections in SPIRL. Each section is a self-describing YAML document keyed by section name.

No configuration sections are currently supported at the trust domain scope. Sections will be introduced with upcoming features.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# No configuration sections are currently supported at the trust domain scope.
# Sections will be introduced with upcoming features.
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sections` (Map of String) A map of configuration section names to their self-describing YAML values
- `trust_domain_id` (String) The ID of the trust domain

### Read-Only

- `updated_at` (String) An RFC3339 timestamp for when the configuration was last updated
- `version` (String) The configuration version, used for optimistic concurrency control
